title: DMD Advocates advises Rabyte on majority stake acquisition by Hakuto
description: Hakuto Co. Ltd. has acquired a majority stake in Rabyte Edge Private Limited.DMD Advocates advised the founders of Rabyte on this transaction. The Firm assisted with transaction structuring, as well as the drafting, negotiation, and finalisation of the transaction documents.The transaction was led by Rashi Dhir (Senior Partner & Head of Corporate), along with Tarinee Sudan (Partner), Shubhangi Bhatnagar (Principal Associate), Arnav Mithal (Associate), Sarvagya Shankar (Associate), and Jasmin
